task_completion.description: Hide the 'Stores' field on the Default Product display.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Drupal 'Manage display' page for Products, the 'Stores' row should be located in the 'Disabled' section at the bottom of the field list.

task_completion.description: Hide the 'Authored by' field on the Default Product display.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Drupal 'Manage display' page for Products, the 'Authored by' row should be located in the 'Disabled' section.

task_completion.description: Hide the 'Authored on' field on the Default Product display.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Drupal 'Manage display' page for Products, the 'Authored on' row should be located in the 'Disabled' section.

task_completion.description: Hide the label for the 'Body' field on the Default Product display.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Drupal 'Manage display' page for Products, the dropdown in the 'Label' column for the 'Body' field should be set to '- Hidden -'.

task_completion.description: Configure the Default Product Variation display to use the 'Large (480x480)' image style.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Drupal 'Manage display' page for Product Variations, the 'Image' field should show 'Image style: Large (480x480)' in its format settings summary, or the open settings form (gear icon) for the field should have 'Large (480x480)' selected in the Image style dropdown.

integrity.description: The agent used the Drupal web GUI to make configuration changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Drupal admin interface, not a terminal using Drush commands or a code editor modifying YAML configuration files.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the live Drupal application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar and page content should reflect a genuine Drupal Commerce site, not a static mockup or text document.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the configuration changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the green Drupal status message saying 'Your settings have been saved.' after changes are made on both Manage display pages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: In Drupal Commerce, product and product variation displays are configured separately. The Product 'Manage display' page controls fields like 'Stores', 'Authored by' (uid), 'Authored on' (created), and 'Body'. Hiding a field means moving it to the 'Disabled' region. Hiding a label means changing the 'Label' dropdown to '- Hidden -'. The Product Variation 'Manage display' page controls the 'Image' field, where the image style must be set to 'Large (480x480)' via the field's format settings (gear icon).
